summary: New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page views, and Get design analytics links. These APIs let you retrieve engagement metrics for a design shared via Canva.

title: You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field na
summary: You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. title: The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is
summary: The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is currently a preview feature.

title: The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
summary: The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. Desktop notifications now pull text from blocks first
summary: Slack desktop client notifications now pull text from blocks first, falling back to the top-level text field only if no text can be extracted from blocks. Mobile notifications continue to exclusively use message.text.

title: Agent context has landed
summary: Agent apps can now receive context about what a user is currently viewing when they send a message. When a user has a channel, DM, thread, canvas, or list open and messages your app, Slack will pass that context automatically.
